instructions: Always read CLAUDE.md before making any changes
Never create cross-schema foreign keys between shared and product schemas
Never write JOINs across schemas - use two separate queries through the repo layer
All primary keys must be UUIDs
Product modules can only import from app/core/ and app/shared/ - never from other products
Use async/await for all database operations
All timestamps must use DateTime(timezone=True) in SQLAlchemy and TIMESTAMPTZ in SQL
